script: RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv); TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' -d "refresh_token=$RT" -d 'scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])'); curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?\$filter=distributionMethod%20eq%20%27organization%27" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" > /tmp/full-$$.json; echo head:; head -c 200 /tmp/full-$$.json; echo; echo; python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/full-$$.json')); [print(repr(a.get('displayName',''))+' / '+a['id']) for a in d.get('value',[])]; print('---total:'+str(len(d.get('value',[])))) "
